title: Build Pipeline: Website Generation

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Triggers build by running `node scripts/build.js` (or `bun run build`)

actors.name: Build System (build.js)
actors.description: Primary orchestrator; coordinates all pipeline stages

actors.name: Bun Bundler
actors.description: HTML/JS/CSS bundler invoked via Bun.build(); minifies and hashes assets

actors.name: Playwright
actors.description: Headless Chromium used by generate-og-image.js to screenshot HTML → JPEG

actors.name: Puppeteer
actors.description: Headless Chrome used by generate-promo-tile.js to screenshot SVG → PNG

actors.name: Cloudflare Pages
actors.description: Deployment target; consumes build/ output including _headers, _redirects, _routes.json

actors.name: File System
actors.description: Reads source files (source/skills/, src/detect-antipatterns.mjs) and writes to public/, build/, dist/

use_cases.name: Generate Sub-Pages
use_cases.description: Calls generateSubPages(rootDir) from build-sub-pages.js. Outputs HTML files to public/skills/, public/anti-patterns/, public/tutorials/, public/visual-mode/.

use_cases.name: Render Skills Index + Detail Pages
use_cases.description: Calls buildSubPageData(), renderDocsSidebar(), renderSkillsOverviewMain(), renderSkillDetail() per skill, renderPage(). Writes public/skills/index.html + public/skills/{id}.html.

use_cases.name: Render Anti-Patterns Page
use_cases.description: Calls groupRulesBySection(rules), renderAntiPatternsSidebar(), renderAntiPatternsMain(), renderPage(). Writes public/anti-patterns/index.html.

use_cases.name: Render Tutorials Index + Detail Pages
use_cases.description: Renders tutorial cards via renderTutorialsIndexMain() and detail via renderTutorialDetail(). Writes public/tutorials/index.html + /tutorials/{slug}.html.

use_cases.name: Render Visual Mode Page
use_cases.description: Calls renderVisualModeMain() — embeds iframe demo, gallery cards from GALLERY_ITEMS. Writes public/visual-mode/index.html.

use_cases.name: Render Shared Docs Sidebar
use_cases.description: renderDocsSidebar(skillsByCategory, tutorials, current) used by all docs pages. Includes tutorials first, then skills by CATEGORY_ORDER.

use_cases.name: Build Static Site (HTML Bundle)
use_cases.description: buildStaticSite(extraEntrypoints) invokes Bun.build() with entrypoints: index.html, cheatsheet.html, privacy.html + generated sub-page files. Outputs to build/. Flattens nested build/public/ to build/.

use_cases.name: Copy Static Assets
use_cases.description: Copies og-image.jpg, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, favicon.svg, apple-touch-icon.png from public/ → build/. Copies antipattern-examples/ dir. Copies detect-antipatterns-browser.js → build/js/.

use_cases.name: Transform Skills per Provider
use_cases.description: Calls createTransformer(config)(skills, DIST_DIR, opts) for each of 10 providers (Cursor, Claude Code, Gemini, Codex, Agents/Copilot, Kiro, OpenCode, Pi, Trae-CN, Trae). Both unprefixed and i-prefixed variants.

use_cases.name: Assemble Universal Directory
use_cases.description: assembleUniversal(distDir, suffix?) merges all provider configDirs into dist/universal/. Runs twice: unprefixed and -prefixed. Writes README.txt listing all 10 providers.

use_cases.name: Create ZIP Bundles
use_cases.description: createAllZips(distDir) from lib/zip.js creates per-provider ZIPs + universal ZIP for download.

use_cases.name: Generate Static API Data
use_cases.description: generateApiData(buildDir, skills, patterns) writes build/_data/api/: skills.json, commands.json, patterns.json, command-source/{id}.json. Enables Cloudflare Pages to serve API routes as static files.

use_cases.name: Generate Cloudflare Pages Config
use_cases.description: generateCFConfig(buildDir) writes build/_headers (security + cache headers), build/_redirects (API rewrites + /gallery redirect), build/_routes.json (functions scope: /api/download/*).

use_cases.name: Generate Authoritative Counts
use_cases.description: generateCounts(rootDir, skills, buildDir) counts active user-invocable skills + detection rule IDs from src/detect-antipatterns.mjs. Writes public/js/generated/counts.js (COMMAND_COUNT, DETECTION_COUNT). Validates stale references in index.html, cheatsheet.html, README.md, NOTICE.md, AGENTS.md, plugin.json, marketplace.json.

use_cases.name: Validate Antipattern Rules
use_cases.description: validateAntipatternRules(rootDir) cross-validates each detection rule's skillGuideline against DON'T lines in source/skills/impeccable/SKILL.md. Build fails if any drift detected.

use_cases.name: Validate Site Header
use_cases.description: validateSiteHeader(rootDir) checks that index.html, cheatsheet.html, privacy.html all include '<!-- site-header v1 -->' marker.

use_cases.name: Validate No Em Dashes
use_cases.description: validateNoEmDashes(rootDir) scans content/site, public HTML, and script files for em dashes (—, —, —). Build fails if any found.

use_cases.name: Generate OG Image
use_cases.description: generate-og-image.js: getCommandCount() counts active skills from source/skills/. getExtensionDataUrl() reads extension-detection.png as base64. Launches Chromium, setContent() with styled HTML (1200×630), waits for fonts, screenshots → public/og-image.jpg (JPEG, quality 90).

use_cases.name: Generate Promo Tile
use_cases.description: generate-promo-tile.js: constructs SVG string (440×280) with brand gradients, faux UI card, magenta detection outline + label tab. Puppeteer screenshots SVG page → extension/icons/promo-small.png.

use_cases.name: Sync Skills to Local Harness Dirs
use_cases.description: Copies dist/{provider}/{configDir}/skills → {rootDir}/{configDir}/skills for all providers. Removes deprecated skill stubs (frontend-design, teach-impeccable, arrange, normalize, onboard, extract).

use_cases.name: Copy Dist to Build Output
use_cases.description: copyDistToBuild(distDir, buildDir) copies entire dist/ into build/_data/dist/ for Cloudflare Functions access.

main_build_flow: build-sub-pages.js: writes public/skills/*.html, public/anti-patterns/index.html, public/tutorials/*.html, public/visual-mode/index.html
build.js: copy static assets (og-image.jpg, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, favicon.svg) → build/
build.js → lib/transformers/index.js: createTransformer(config)(skills, DIST_DIR, opts) × 10 providers × 2 (plain + prefixed)
build.js: sync skills to local harness dirs, remove deprecated stubs
build.js: exit(1) if any errors, else log '✨ Build complete!'
key_dependencies: build.js imports readSourceFiles, readPatterns from lib/utils.js
build.js imports createTransformer, PROVIDERS from lib/transformers/index.js
build-sub-pages.js imports buildSubPageData, CATEGORY_ORDER, CATEGORY_LABELS, GALLERY_ITEMS from lib/sub-pages-data.js
build-sub-pages.js imports renderMarkdown, slugify from lib/render-markdown.js
outputs: build/ — Bun-bundled static site (HTML + hashed JS/CSS + assets)
build/_data/api/ — static JSON API files (skills, commands, patterns, command-source/)
build/_data/dist/ — provider ZIPs for CF Functions download routes
dist/{provider}/ — transformed skill files per provider (10 providers, plain + prefixed)
dist/universal/ and dist/universal-prefixed/ — all-provider merged dirs
extension/icons/promo-small.png — Chrome Web Store promo tile (separate script)
validation_gates: generateCounts: stale count references in HTML/MD/JSON files → build fails
validateAntipatternRules: drift between detect-antipatterns.mjs and SKILL.md DON'Ts → build fails
validateSiteHeader: missing '<!-- site-header v1 -->' on hand-authored pages → build fails
validateNoEmDashes: em dashes in copy files → build fails
important_notes: generate-og-image.js and generate-promo-tile.js are NOT part of main build() — run separately via 'bun run og-image' etc.
Sub-pages output to public/ (gitignored), then Bun picks them up as entrypoints alongside hand-authored pages
Bun's HTML bundler runs with minify:true and [dir]/[name]-[hash].[ext] naming to handle CF Pages dedup issue
PROVIDERS covers: cursor, claude, gemini, codex, agents, kiro, opencode, pi, trae-cn, trae (10 total)
generateSubPages is shared between build.js and server/index.js (same code path for dev and prod)
build/ nested public/ flattening: if build/public/ exists, its contents are moved up to build/ then build/public/ removed
